title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Siemens India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Siemens India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
